title: (incorrect) MAL loop instead of manifold triggered by simple change in target list
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE input_double (a1 VARCHAR, a2 DOUBLE PRECISION, prob DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO input_double (a1, a2, prob) VALUES ('latitude', 34.0522, 0.9);
INSERT INTO input_double (a1, a2, prob) VALUES ('longitude', -118.2437, 0.8);
CREATE TABLE v(a1 INT, a2 POINT, prob DOUBLE PRECISION);

INSERT INTO v (a1, a2, prob) SELECT (SELECT a2 FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'latitude')::INT, POINT((SELECT a2 FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'latitude'), (SELECT a2 FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'longitude')), (SELECT prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'latitude') * (SELECT prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'longitude');
SELECT a1, a2, prob FROM v;
key_bug_features: MAL loop triggered by target list change
